introSection: Dragon Mountain is an Arrow Dynamics steel terrain roller coaster located at MarineLand in Niagara Falls, Ontario, Canada. Opened in 1983, the ride features four inversions, including a rare bowtie.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Dragon Mountain opened on 16 July 1983.

Dragon Mountain closed for the 2024 season along with the rest of the rides at MarineLand.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Dragon Mountain begins in a cave-themed station. Its chain lift hill follows the terrain up to the top of the mountain, while the rest of the ride drops back down several hills while going through two vertical loops. It is the only roller coaster with a bowtie element.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a stylised dragon.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Dragon Mountain on the parks website

fullText:
Dragon Mountain is an Arrow Dynamics steel terrain roller coaster located at MarineLand in Niagara Falls, Ontario, Canada. Opened in 1983, the ride features four inversions, including a rare bowtie.

Dragon Mountain opened on 16 July 1983.

Dragon Mountain closed for the 2024 season along with the rest of the rides at MarineLand.

Dragon Mountain begins in a cave-themed station. Its chain lift hill follows the terrain up to the top of the mountain, while the rest of the ride drops back down several hills while going through two vertical loops. It is the only roller coaster with a bowtie element.

Brown track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble a stylised dragon.




 * Dragon Mountain on the parks website
